description: Connect Databricks to sync clusters, jobs, notebooks, MLflow experiments, registered models, and SQL warehouses for unified analytics intelligence.

install_fields.label: Workspace URL (e.g. https://adb-123456.azuredatabricks.net)
install_fields.help: The full URL of your Databricks workspace. Found in the browser address bar when logged in.

install_fields.label: Personal Access Token
install_fields.help: Generate a PAT in Databricks: User Settings → Developer → Access tokens → Generate new token

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate workspace_url + token via SCIM Me endpoint and record connector as installed

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify credentials are still valid via GET /api/2.0/preview/scim/v2/Me; returns email

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Sync clusters, jobs, and notebooks to the Shielva knowledge base

methods.name: list_clusters
methods.description: List all clusters in the Databricks workspace

methods.name: list_jobs
methods.description: List all jobs in the workspace with automatic pagination

methods.name: list_notebooks
methods.description: List workspace notebook objects at the given path (default root /)

methods.name: list_experiments
methods.description: List all MLflow experiments in the workspace

methods.name: list_models
methods.description: List all MLflow registered models in the workspace

methods.name: list_sql_warehouses
methods.description: List all SQL warehouses (Databricks SQL endpoints) in the workspace
